overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist riding a robotic mount through a snowy mountain landscape. The character traverses a winding trail, scales a vertical cliff face, passes through a dark ruined tunnel with icicles, and emerges into an expansive snowy valley with distant peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with pine forest

agents.ego_description: riding the robotic mount along a winding snowy mountain path surrounded by snow-covered pines

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees heavily laden with snow on branches
massive vertical rock wall rising in the distance ahead
snow-covered path winding through the mountain terrain

segments.scene_description: The character rides a robotic mount along a winding snowy trail surrounded by snow-covered pine trees. The path leads toward massive cliff faces visible in the distance under a bright clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical cliff face with valley below

events.description: mount transitions from walking to climbing vertically up the rock face

agents.ego_description: scaling the steep cliff face on the robotic mount with the valley visible far below

entered.detail: steep stone cliff wall being climbed by the mount
deep mountain valley with mist visible far below the climbing path

segments.scene_description: The mount begins scaling a steep rock face, shifting the perspective to a vertical ascent. The valley floor becomes visible far below as the character climbs, with the surrounding pine trees now appearing distant.

events.description: entering the dark stone tunnel entrance with hanging icicles
lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to dark shadowy interior

agents.ego_description: riding through the dark tunnel entrance with icicles hanging from the ceiling

entered.detail: large stone archway marking the tunnel entrance
long icicles hanging from the tunnel ceiling and entrance
ancient weathered stone walls and broken structures inside the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, ruined tunnel structure adorned with hanging icicles. The environment transitions from bright exterior sunlight to a shadowy, enclosed passage with ancient stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy valley with distant mountain peaks

events.description: exiting the tunnel into the expansive snowy valley landscape
returning to bright natural sunlight after the dark tunnel

agents.ego_description: riding through the open valley with distant mountains and drifting mist visible ahead

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered valley floor stretching into the distance
towering snow-capped mountain range surrounding the valley
low-lying mist and fog drifting through the valley floor

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens into a vast snowy valley surrounded by towering mountain peaks. Mist drifts across the landscape as the character continues riding through the pristine snow under bright sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a forested mountain trail through a vertical ascent and a dark ruin, finally opening into a vast alpine valley. It begins with the character riding a robotic mount along a winding snowy path flanked by pine trees, moving steadily toward massive distant cliffs under a clear sky. As the mount begins scaling a steep rock face, the perspective shifts to a vertical climb that leaves the forest far below. The scene then transitions from the bright exterior sunlight into the shadows of a ruined tunnel adorned with hanging icicles and ancient stone architecture. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosure to reveal an expansive snowy valley surrounded by towering peaks and drifting mist under a brilliant sun.
